nodes.name: Makira honeyeater
nodes.summary: The Makira honeyeater (Meliarchus sclateri), also known as the San Cristobal honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Makira in the Solomon Islands. References BirdLife International 2004. Melidectes sclateri. 2006 IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. Downloaded on 26 July 2007.
